purpose: Small portable snapshot that points the skill at bundled H5G corpus guidance and optional full bakeoff resources.

fallback_semantics.when_full_research_missing: Use the read-only network consolidated report pack when available; otherwise use the bundled distilled snapshot for family, role, motion, avatar, mesh/deform, and claim-boundary guidance.
fallback_semantics.when_network_resource_missing_or_empty: Continue with bundled snapshot and report that full bakeoff proof is unavailable.
fallback_semantics.production_claim: A bundled snapshot is advisory evidence only; it is not a fresh full bakeoff and not art approval.

safety.network_resource_policy: The skill may read the G-drive corpus resource folder when available, but must not populate or mutate it.
